name: menupilot
description: Easily import, export, duplicate, backup, and restore WordPress navigation menus. MenuPilot helps you move menus between sites safely with clean imports and reliable structure handling.
author: Mayank Majeji

scripts.bump:patch: bump patch --commit 'Version %s.' --tag --push menupilot.php package.json package-lock.json readme.txt
scripts.bump:minor: bump minor --commit 'Version %s.' --tag --push menupilot.php package.json package-lock.json readme.txt
scripts.bump:major: bump major --commit 'Version %s.' --tag --push menupilot.php package.json package-lock.json readme.txt
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:html && composer run lint
scripts.test:all: npm run lint:all && composer run test && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
